values.description: Base URL for the service running locally via `mvn spring-boot:run` or `docker-compose up`
Default stock ticker for the 'Custom symbol' requests. Change this to any supported ticker (e.g., MSFT, TSLA, NVDA, GOOGL, META, JPM, AMZN)
Alpha Vantage API key. With 'demo', only IBM returns live data. Get a free key at https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key
Auto-populated by the AAPL lookup test script. Stores the last retrieved price.
